docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $899.00 FILED BY HINCK, DIANE: PROPERTY MGR./ AGENT FOR SIX TWELVE- NORTHWEST ASSET MANAGEMENT CO., INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT THARNING, BEN O. DBA/VIKING SANDBLASTING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
